name_en: BOTTEGA VENETA New ANDIAMO Tote. This denim woven bag perfectly blends retro and trendy! Handwoven denim, every thread carries craftsmanship, and the color-block design breaks the mold. Not only is the capacity impressive, but it also adds a touch of fun and cuteness, easily holding various styles. Exquisite metal accessories shine on the ruggedness of the denim, combining toughness with softness. Denim naturally brings a youthful and energetic vibe, giving a feeling of both retro classicism and relaxed freedom. During the weaving process, the bag is hand-woven with denim through small gaps into the leather surface, a truly exquisite technique! The capacity is beyond doubt, it can fit an umbrella and a water bottle!
